case_title: PABLO VILLAREAL VS. VOZIKES 2017, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLAREAL, PABLO AS TO DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-20-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO AMPHORA INVESTMENTS, LLC ON 11/16/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VILLAREAL, PABLO AS TO DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC PATEL, SUE AVELLINO INVESTMENTS LLC AMPHORA INVESTMENTS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLAREAL, PABLO AS TO DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLAREAL, PABLO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC PATEL, SUE AVELLINO INVESTMENTS LLC PLAINTIFF SEEKS DAMAGES FOR A BAD FAITH EVICTION, BUT ALL ISSUES CONCERNING THE EVICTION HAVE BEEN RESOLVED BY THE SETTLEMENT THE PARTIES EXECUTED IN MARCH 2018. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT HE IS ENTITLED TO DAMAGES FOR BAD FAITH LANDLORD HARASSMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-18-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLAREAL, PABLO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLAREAL, PABLO AS TO DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-20-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO AMPHORA INVESTMENTS LLC ON 10/05/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT AVELLINO INVESTMENTS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF PABLO VILLAREAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017,IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LOUIS VOZIKES, OWNER. DEFENDANT SUE PATEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AVELLINO INVESTMENTS REPRESENTED BY CYNTHIA VLAHOS, OWNER. DEFENDANT AMPHORA INVESTMENT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICES FILED ON AMPHORA INVESTMENTS. PLAINTIFF PABLO VILLAREAL DISMISSED DEFENDANT AMPHONA INVESTMENTS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED AUG-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, SUE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AVELLINO INVESTMENTS LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AVELLINO INVESTMENTS LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
REMARK: RECEIVED NOTICE FROM CT CORP - CT CORPORATION SYSTEM IS NOT THE REGISTERED AGENT FOR AN ENTITY BY THE NAME OF VOZIKES 2017 LLC. - CT CORP WAS UNABLE TO FORWARD.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-09-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF PABLO VAILLAREAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS VOZIKES 2017 IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LOUIS N. VOZIKES; DEFENDANT AVELLINO INVESTMENTS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CYNTHIA VLAHOS; DEFENDANT SUE PATEL IS PRESENT; DEFENDANT AMPHORA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS).
